_provenance: schema-derived from autotuner.OPTUNA_SEARCH_SPACE_KEYS (frozenset at module scope) + project AC-V1 scope decision
_scope_decision: V1 calibration sweep tunes ONLY PARABOLIC_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD and VWAP_CROSS_HWM_PCT. All other params remain in the general autotuner search space but are NOT the focus of run_calibration_sweep.
_note_on_clamp_endpoints: bleed-arm clamp endpoints (VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN, VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX) are hand-set named constants in math_engine.py; they are not Optuna trial parameters in either run_autotuner or run_calibration_sweep.
